common.loadFailedBody: Something went wrong while loading. Please go back and try again.

history.emptyBody: Run the first assessment for {{name}} — it only takes a few minutes.
history.deleteBody: The draft from {{date}} will be removed. This cannot be undone.
history.deleteFailed: Couldn't delete the draft. Please try again.
history.lockedNoDob: Add this child's date of birth to unlock the complementary feeding assessment. It opens once the child is {{min}} days old.
history.lockedBody: Complementary feeding starts once the child is {{min}} days (about 5 months) old.

runner.saveFailed: Couldn't save the draft. Please try again.
runner.submitFailed: Couldn't submit the assessment. Please try again.
runner.exitBody: You have unsaved answers. Save them as a draft to continue later, or discard them.
runner.emptyBody: This assessment has no questions yet. Please check back later.
runner.cfLockedBody: The complementary feeding assessment unlocks once the child is {{min}} days old.

plan.scoreSub: {{red}} answers need a little attention — here's your coaching plan.
plan.allGreen: Everything is as per LAP. Wonderful work!
plan.needsAttentionSub: A gentle coaching to-do list based on this assessment.
plan.reviewSub: These answers were not as per LAP — go over them together with the mother.
plan.draftNotice: This assessment is still a draft — finish it to get the full plan.
